title: Amazing service!
content: The team went above and beyond to help me. Will definitely come back!

title: Disappointed
content: Waited 45 minutes for my order. Cold food when it finally arrived. Very frustrating experience.

title: Good but could be better
content: Great product overall. Shipping was fast but packaging could use improvement.

title: Never ordering again
content: Wrong order 3 times. Complete waste of money. Customer service was rude.

title: Perfect!
content: Exactly what I needed. Fast delivery too! Highly recommend.

title: Average experience
content: It's okay. Nothing special but nothing wrong either. Would probably come back.
Really liked the staff. They were helpful and patient. Good experience overall.

title: Too expensive
content: Prices have gone up significantly. Not worth it anymore. Finding alternatives.
